promotions.title: 0 Handling Fee for the First Remittance to Chinese Mainland
promotions.highlight: 💸 Zero handling fee on your first transfer to Chinese Mainland
promotions.description: Use 'Remit to Chinese Mainland·WeRemit' in the Airstar Bank App to enjoy zero handling fees on your first transfer. Recipients can receive funds as soon as 1 hour after transfer.
promotions.quota: One-time offer per customer. Limited quota, first come, first served.

promotions.title: Activate Money Safe, Get a Pacific Coffee Voucher
promotions.highlight: 🔒 Enhanced protection against fraud while earning interest
promotions.description: Enhanced protection against fraud losses while still earning Savings or Time Deposit interest rates. Funds can only be unlocked with an in-person appointment, providing additional security.

promotions.title: Travel With Visa Flight Booking Cash Rebate
promotions.highlight: ✈️ Up to $800 cash rebate on airline ticket purchases
promotions.description: Use Registered Eligible Visa Card to pay for air tickets booked with Air New Zealand, ANA, Ethiopian Airlines, EVA AIR or Singapore Airlines via their designated official Hong Kong or Macau websites. Receive cash rebates based on transaction amount.
promotions.quota: One-time reward per eligible Visa cardholder
promotions.cost: Minimum HKD4,000 transaction for HKD240 rebate; HKD8,000+ for HKD800 rebate

promotions.title: Bank Securities Transfer 24/7 Service
promotions.highlight: 🏦 24/7 instant bank securities transfers in multiple currencies
promotions.description: Support for bank securities transfers in HKD, USD, and CNY with 24/7 availability and instant arrival. Convenient for managing multi-currency investment accounts.

promotions.title: Lifetime $0 Commissions on HK Stocks
promotions.highlight: 💹 Zero commission trading on Hong Kong stocks forever
promotions.description: $0 commissions on HK stocks with no expiration for accounts that have obtained eligibility. Promotion is limited to accounts opened during the specific promotion period based on system-recorded time.
promotions.period: Forever for eligible accounts opened during promotion period
promotions.quota: Limited to accounts opened during promotion period

promotions.title: Mobile Account Opening in 5 Minutes
promotions.highlight: 📱 Account opening as fast as 5 minutes
promotions.description: Support for Hong Kong Residents and Visitors in Hong Kong to open accounts via mobile phone. Fast digital onboarding process with minimal paperwork.

promotions.title: No Account Management Fees
promotions.highlight: 💰 Zero account management fees and no minimum balance
promotions.description: Enjoy free banking services with no account management fees and no minimum deposit balance requirement. All account services available with no ongoing charges.

promotions.title: Multi-Currency Savings Account
promotions.highlight: 💱 No minimum balance with multi-currency options
promotions.description: Savings deposit account with no minimum balance requirement and support for multiple currencies. Convenient for maintaining funds in various currencies.

promotions.title: Multi-Currency Instant Transfers
promotions.highlight: 💱 Round-the-clock FX service with real-time quotes
promotions.description: 24/7 foreign exchange service with real-time quotes, instant trading, and immediate transfers. Supports 11 currencies including HKD, USD, CNY, and more.

promotions.title: Trade Hong Kong & US Stocks Instantly
promotions.highlight: 🇺🇸 Trade US stocks for just US$1.99 per order
promotions.description: Low-cost trading of US stocks at just US$1.99 per order. Includes fractional shares investing with as little as US$5, providing access to a wide range of US stocks and ETFs.

promotions.title: Personal Loan Service
promotions.highlight: 💳 Personal loans with APR from 7.43% to 35.05%
promotions.description: Total loan amount up to 12 times of monthly salary or HKD1,000,000 (whichever is lower). Fast application process with loan disbursement in as little as 5 minutes.
promotions.cost: Varies based on loan amount and APR

promotions.title: Personal Loan with Personalized Stellar APR
promotions.highlight: 💰 Loan approval and disbursement in as fast as 5 minutes
promotions.description: Customers can apply for personal loans with personalized APRs ranging from 7.43% to 35.05%. Total loan amounts can be up to 12 times monthly salary or HKD1,000,000, whichever is lower.
promotions.cost: Interest rates vary based on customer profile

promotions.title: Fractional Shares Investing
promotions.highlight: 📊 Start investing with just 1 share or US$5
promotions.description: Customers can invest in HK stocks with just 1 share or as little as US$5 for US stocks through fractional share investing. This makes investing more accessible with a lower entry barrier.
promotions.cost: As little as 1 share for HK stocks or US$5 for US stocks

promotions.title: Pay Shield Real-Time Fraud Protection
promotions.highlight: 🛡️ 24/7 real-time fraud protection for payments
promotions.description: Airstar Bank Visa Platinum Card offers Pay Shield, a 24/7 real-time fraud protection system. This feature provides an additional layer of security for all payment transactions.

promotions.title: No Minimum Balance Requirement
promotions.highlight: 💳 No account management fees and no minimum deposit
promotions.description: Airstar Bank offers savings accounts with no minimum balance requirement. Multi-currency savings options are available with no account management fees.

promotions.title: Flexible Time Deposit Placement
promotions.highlight: ⏱️ 24/7 time deposit placement with flexible tenors
promotions.description: Customers can place time deposits anytime with flexible tenors, available 24 hours a day, 7 days a week. Interest booster options are available to help customers earn more on their deposits.

promotions.title: Pay Shield Real-Time Fraud Protection
promotions.highlight: 🛡️ 24/7 real-time fraud protection for payment transactions
promotions.description: Airstar Bank Visa Platinum Card offers Pay Shield, a 24/7 real-time fraud protection system. This security feature continuously monitors transactions to detect and prevent fraudulent activities, providing cardholders with enhanced payment protection.

promotions.title: Money Safe Anti-Fraud Protection
promotions.highlight: 🔒 Enhanced protection against fraud while earning interest
promotions.description: Money Safe feature provides enhanced protection against fraud losses. Secure your funds while still earning Savings or Time Deposit rates, with funds only unlockable through in-person appointment.

promotions.title: eM+ High Yield Account (Libra Savings) up to 2.0% p.a. Interest Rate
promotions.highlight: 💰 Earn up to 2.0% p.a. interest on your savings
promotions.description: Customers who successfully upgrade to eM+ High Yield Account (Libra Savings) through the AlipayHK App can enjoy up to 2.0% p.a. interest. The 2.0% p.a. interest rate is applicable to deposit amounts ranging between HKD 200,000 - 800,000 in the account.

promotions.title: SME Loan Cash Rebate Promotion
promotions.highlight: 💵 Up to HK$100,000 cash rebate on first withdrawal
promotions.description: SME customers can enjoy up to HK$100,000 cash rebate on their first loan withdrawal with Ant Bank's SME loan service. This is a limited-time promotion for small and medium enterprises seeking business financing.
promotions.cost: Must apply for and withdraw from SME loan

promotions.title: Multi-Currency Savings Account Upgrade
promotions.highlight: 🌐 Support for HKD, RMB and USD in one account
promotions.description: The savings account has been upgraded to support multiple currencies including HKD, RMB, and USD. Customers can directly transfer funds from Libra Savings to third-party accounts with daily transfer limits of up to HK$1 million.

promotions.title: Securities Trading Platform with Low/Zero Commission
promotions.highlight: 🆓 Zero commission trading on securities
promotions.description: Ant Bank offers commission-free securities trading as part of their 'zero commission new era' promotion. This allows customers to trade stocks without paying commission fees, subject to terms and conditions.

promotions.title: Insurance Products with Annual Rate up to 3.6%
promotions.highlight: 📈 Up to 3.6% annual rate on insurance products
promotions.description: Ant Bank offers insurance products with annual rates of up to 3.6%. These insurance plans are products of YF Life Insurance International Ltd. and not Ant Bank, intended for sale in Hong Kong SAR through Ant Bank.

promotions.title: Fund Investment with HKD 1 Minimum
promotions.highlight: 💲 Invest in funds with just HK$1
promotions.description: Customers can start investing in funds with as little as HK$1. This low entry barrier makes fund investments accessible to everyone, allowing customers to decide how much they want to invest.

promotions.title: New Ant Bank Investment Fund Platform
promotions.highlight: 🔄 $0 subscription and redemption fees for all funds
promotions.description: Ant Bank has launched a new investment fund platform offering funds from leading companies. During this limited-time promotion, customers can enjoy zero subscription fees and zero redemption fees for all funds, providing truly zero-cost investment opportunities.

promotions.title: One-Minute Investment Account Opening
promotions.highlight: ⏱️ Open an investment account in as fast as 1 minute
promotions.description: Customers can open an investment account in as fast as 1 minute. The process is simple with no need for income proof, allowing for immediate use after successful account opening.
promotions.quota: All eligible customers aged 18 or above, not residing in or citizens of US/Canada

promotions.title: One-stop Hong Kong and US Stock Trading Platform
promotions.highlight: 🌎 Access to Hong Kong and US stock markets in one platform
promotions.description: A comprehensive trading platform connecting Hong Kong and US stock markets, allowing customers to access global investment opportunities. The platform offers Hong Kong stocks, US stocks, ETFs and other global investment solutions.

promotions.title: Time Deposit with No Early Withdrawal Penalties
promotions.highlight: 🔓 No penalty for early withdrawal of time deposits
promotions.description: Ant Bank offers time deposits with no penalties for early withdrawal. Customers can withdraw their entire time deposit before maturity without incurring any penalty fees, providing flexibility with their savings.

promotions.title: Guaranteed Safe Deposit Service
promotions.highlight: 🔒 Lock your deposits for enhanced security against fraud
promotions.description: Ant Bank has launched the Guaranteed Safe Deposit Service, an anti-fraud measure initiated by the Hong Kong Monetary Authority. This service allows customers to lock idle deposits, preventing unauthorized transfers while still earning interest and maintaining deposit protection.

promotions.title: Time Deposit with Early Withdrawal Without Penalty
promotions.highlight: 🔓 Withdraw your time deposit early with zero penalty
promotions.description: Ant Bank offers time deposits with no penalty for early withdrawal, allowing customers to access their funds when needed without financial penalties. Full withdrawal of the deposit is required (partial withdrawals not supported).

promotions.title: Direct Transfer from Libra Savings to Third-Party Accounts
promotions.highlight: 🔄 Transfer directly from Libra Savings to third-party accounts
promotions.description: Customers can now transfer funds directly from their Libra Savings account to third-party accounts through the Ant Bank APP. The daily transfer limit has also been increased to up to HKD 1 million.

promotions.title: Dual-Account Security Service
promotions.highlight: 🔒 Lock your reserve deposits for enhanced security
promotions.description: Ant Bank has launched the Dual-Account Security Service, an anti-fraud measure promoted by the Hong Kong Monetary Authority. This service allows customers to lock their reserve deposits, preventing fund transfers through any channel to reduce the risk of fraudulent transactions.

promotions.title: Installment Loan with Fast Approval
promotions.highlight: 💸 Simple loan application with instant fund disbursement
promotions.description: Ant Bank offers installment loans with a simple application process and instant fund disbursement. The service features flexible loan amounts, special low interest rates, a simplified application process, and fast approval and disbursement.
promotions.cost: Loan interest and potential fees apply

promotions.title: Personal Loan with Revolving Credit
promotions.highlight: 🔄 Revolving credit with flexible withdrawal and instant disbursement
promotions.description: Ant Bank offers a revolving personal loan product where the credit limit can be reused, allowing flexible withdrawals and instant fund disbursement. Features include easy financial management, simple application, transparent fees, and flexible withdrawals.
promotions.cost: Loan interest and potential fees apply

promotions.title: SGAD (Smart Guarded Account Designation) Service
promotions.highlight: 🔒 Lock your standby deposits with SGAD for extra security
promotions.description: Ant Bank (Hong Kong) has launched the Smart Guarded Account Designation (SGAD) service, an anti-fraud measure introduced by the Hong Kong Monetary Authority. This service allows customers to lock standby deposits which cannot be transferred out through any channels, reducing the risk of fraudulent transfers.

promotions.title: Low Minimum Time Deposit Amount
promotions.highlight: 💰 Open a time deposit with just HKD 1
promotions.description: Ant Bank allows customers to place time deposits with a minimum amount of just HKD 1. This exceptionally low entry threshold makes time deposits accessible to all customers regardless of their financial capacity.

promotions.title: Multi-Currency Time Deposit
promotions.highlight: 🌐 Place time deposits in HKD and USD currencies
promotions.description: Ant Bank's time deposit service supports both Hong Kong Dollar and US Dollar deposits. This multi-currency support allows customers to diversify their time deposits across different currencies.

promotions.title: Securities Trading Commission-Free Promotion
promotions.highlight: 🏆 Trade stocks with zero commission fees!
promotions.description: Ant Bank offers zero commission on securities trading, allowing customers to trade Hong Kong and US stocks more cost-effectively. This promotion is part of their one-stop securities trading service with bank-level wealth management.
promotions.cost: Free, subject to terms and conditions

promotions.title: Fixed Deposit No Penalty for Early Withdrawal
promotions.highlight: ⏱️ Open your account in as fast as 3 minutes!
promotions.description: Ant Bank offers a fast account opening experience that can take as little as 3 minutes. This feature makes it convenient for customers to open investment accounts quickly without income proof documents.

promotions.title: Fastee Secure Service
promotions.highlight: 🔒 Enhanced security for your deposits with anti-fraud measures!
promotions.description: Ant Bank has launched the Fastee Secure Service, an anti-fraud measure initiated by the Hong Kong Monetary Authority. The service allows customers to lock spare deposits that cannot be transferred out through any channels, reducing the risk of fraud while still earning interest.

promotions.title: One-Stop Securities Trading Platform
promotions.highlight: 🌎 Trade Hong Kong and US stocks on a single platform!
promotions.description: Ant Bank offers a one-stop trading platform connecting Hong Kong and US stock markets, providing global investment opportunities. The platform gives access to Hong Kong stocks, US stocks, ETFs and other global investment solutions.
promotions.cost: Trading fees apply as per service charge schedule

promotions.title: Account Opening in 5 Minutes
promotions.highlight: ⏱️ Open an account instantly before your coffee is ready
promotions.description: Open a bank account in as fast as 5 minutes using just your HKID card and mobile number. The streamlined process allows for instant account opening, faster than the time it takes to prepare a cup of coffee.
promotions.quota: Hong Kong identity card holder aged 18 or above, non-US person only

promotions.title: Small Change Savings Program
promotions.highlight: 💰 Start saving from as little as HKD 1
promotions.description: Flexible savings plan that allows customers to start building their savings with as little as HKD 1. Designed to help customers save for adventures or personal milestones with maximum flexibility.

promotions.title: Multi-Currency Transfers in HKD, CNY and USD
promotions.highlight: 🌐 Make instant transfers in HKD, CNY and USD
promotions.description: Transfer service that allows customers to make instant transfers in multiple currencies including HKD, CNY, and USD to other local accounts. Available anytime from anywhere with mobile banking.

promotions.title: Global Remittance Service
promotions.highlight: 🌍 Send money globally from your smartphone
promotions.description: International remittance service that enables customers to send money worldwide directly from their smartphone. Includes real-time exchange rates for foreign currency purchases and seamless transfers to payment networks for cashless spending.

promotions.title: Deposit Protection up to HKD 800,000
promotions.highlight: 🛡️ Deposits protected up to HKD 800,000
promotions.description: As a member of Hong Kong's Deposit Protection Scheme, Fusion Bank protects eligible deposits up to a maximum of HKD 800,000 per depositor. Provides security and peace of mind for customer deposits.
promotions.quota: Maximum protection of HKD 800,000 per depositor

promotions.title: Fixed Deposit Bonus Interest for Foreign Currency Exchange
promotions.highlight: 💱 Special exchange rates and time deposit bonus interest
promotions.description: Promotional offer for foreign currency exchange featuring bonus interest rates on time deposits. Includes currency exchange between USD, HKD, and RMB with no upper limit on transaction amount.

promotions.title: Flash Monday High-Interest HKD Time Deposit
promotions.highlight: ⚡ Special high interest rate on HKD time deposits every Monday
promotions.description: Special promotional time deposit offering higher interest rates on Hong Kong Dollar deposits. Available on Mondays as part of the 'Flash Monday' campaign from Fusion Bank.

promotions.title: Savings Interest Plus
promotions.highlight: ➕ Enhanced interest rates on savings accounts
promotions.description: Special promotion offering bonus interest rates on savings accounts. Provides customers with higher returns on their deposits for a promotional period.

promotions.title: Foreign Currency Time Deposit Interest Rate Boost
promotions.highlight: 🔼 Enhanced interest rates for foreign currency time deposits
promotions.description: Special promotion offering boosted interest rates for time deposits in foreign currencies. Available for customers exchanging currencies and placing them in time deposits.

promotions.title: liviSave Preferential Savings Rate
promotions.highlight: 💰 Earn preferential savings rate with no minimum deposit required
promotions.description: Add funds to liviSave account to earn preferential savings interest rate. No minimum deposit is required, making it accessible for all customers. Account opening is 100% online and can be done quickly through the app.

promotions.title: Fast and Free FPS Transfers
promotions.highlight: ⚡ Fast and free transfers via FPS anytime
promotions.description: Send money instantly to anyone at any time using FPS (Faster Payment System). All transfers through FPS are free of charge and complete quickly, making it easy to send money to friends, family, or businesses.

promotions.title: Secure QR Payment System
promotions.highlight: 📱 Fast and secure QR payments accepted across Hong Kong
promotions.description: Make secure and convenient purchases at merchants across Hong Kong using QR code payments. The service offers a seamless shopping experience with quick transaction processing and enhanced security features.

promotions.title: livi Rewards Program
promotions.highlight: 🎁 Daily rewards and benefits for livi customers
promotions.description: livi Rewards program offers various benefits and rewards for everyday banking activities. The program is designed to bring 'everyday delights and rewards' to customers, enhancing the regular banking experience.

promotions.title: liviSave No Minimum Balance
promotions.highlight: 🏦 No minimum balance requirement and no fees for account
promotions.description: Open a liviSave account with no minimum balance requirement and no account maintenance fees. Designed to meet both spending and saving needs, this flexible account offers hassle-free banking.

promotions.title: 100% Online Account Opening
promotions.highlight: 📱 Open a bank account 100% online with no complicated documents
promotions.description: Open a livi bank account completely online via the app without complicated documentation. The process is quick and easy, allowing customers to start using their account immediately.

promotions.title: liviSave No Fees Account
promotions.highlight: 🆓 No fees and no minimum deposit required
promotions.description: Open a liviSave account with no fees and no minimum deposit balance requirements. The account caters to both paying and saving needs with complete flexibility.

promotions.title: Universal Voyage Travel Insurance Plan
promotions.highlight: ✈️ Comprehensive travel insurance protection
promotions.description: livi offers the Universal Voyage Travel Insurance Plan to provide protection during your travels. This plan covers various travel-related risks and emergencies for customers.

promotions.title: Easy HomeCare Insurance
promotions.highlight: 🏠 Protection for your home with Easy HomeCare
promotions.description: livi provides Easy HomeCare insurance plan to protect customers' homes and belongings. This insurance product offers coverage for various home-related risks and damages.

promotions.title: Pet Care Insurance
promotions.highlight: 🐾 Insurance coverage for your beloved pets
promotions.description: livi offers Pet Care insurance plan to help cover veterinary expenses and other pet-related costs. This plan provides financial protection for pet owners when caring for their furry family members.

promotions.title: livi Flexi Personal Loan
promotions.highlight: 💸 Flexible personal loan solutions
promotions.description: livi Flexi Loan offers personal loan options with flexible terms to meet various financial needs. The loan product provides customers with access to funds for personal expenses with customizable repayment schedules.
promotions.cost: Interest rates and fees not specified

promotions.title: livi Flexi Balance Transfer
promotions.highlight: 💱 Transfer outstanding balances with flexible terms
promotions.description: livi offers a Balance Transfer option under their Flexi Loan product to help customers consolidate existing debts. This service allows transferring balances from other financial institutions to livi with potentially more favorable terms.
promotions.cost: Interest rates and fees not specified

promotions.title: livi Business SME Financing
promotions.highlight: 🏢 Financing solutions for small and medium enterprises
promotions.description: livi Business offers SME Financing options to help small and medium-sized businesses access capital for growth and operations. This financing solution is designed specifically for the needs of SME customers.
promotions.cost: Interest rates and fees not specified

promotions.title: BOC Chill Card
promotions.highlight: 💳 Special benefits with the BOC Chill Card
promotions.description: livi offers the BOC Chill Card for customers looking for payment solutions with added benefits. This card provides various privileges and features for cardholders' everyday spending needs.

promotions.title: BOC Mastercard Debit Card
promotions.highlight: 💳 Convenient spending with BOC Mastercard Debit Card
promotions.description: livi provides the BOC Mastercard Debit Card that allows direct access to funds in customers' accounts. This card offers worldwide acceptance and secure payment options for daily transactions.

promotions.title: Money Safe Rewards
promotions.highlight: 🔒 Special rewards for keeping your money safe
promotions.description: livi offers 'Money Safe Rewards' (智安存獎賞) program that provides benefits to customers for maintaining security measures. This program rewards customers for practicing safe banking habits.

promotions.title: No Minimum Deposit Requirement
promotions.highlight: 🆓 No fees and no minimum balance requirements
promotions.description: Open and maintain a liviSave account with no minimum deposit requirement and no maintenance fees. This feature makes the account accessible to everyone regardless of their financial situation.

promotions.title: QR Cash Withdrawal
promotions.highlight: 💳 Withdraw cash using QR codes
promotions.description: livi offers a QR Cash feature that allows users to withdraw money using QR codes. This provides a convenient alternative to traditional ATM card withdrawals.

promotions.title: Pay your tax with Mox Credit Card, split and earn cash reward
promotions.highlight: 💰 Earn up to HKD500 cash reward when paying tax with instalment
promotions.description: Pay your second tax instalment with Mox Credit Card and apply for instalment to spread the payment. Earn up to HKD500 in cash rewards while easing financial pressure during tax season.

promotions.title: Keeta Exclusive Flash Sale
promotions.highlight: ⚡️ Up to HKD80 off orders on Keeta
promotions.description: Order on Keeta with your Mox Card and enjoy a Mox exclusive discount of up to HKD20 off per order, saving up to HKD80 for the whole month. Additional surprise vouchers and welcome rewards are available.

promotions.title: Xiaomi Cash Rewards and Instalments Offer
promotions.highlight: 📱 Up to 7% total cash rewards at Xiaomi + 0% instalments
promotions.description: Shop at mi.com or any Xiaomi Store with Mox Credit Card to earn up to 5% extra cash rebate (capped at HKD450) plus up to 12-month 0% interest instalments. Combined with standard up to 2% Unlimited CashBack for a total of up to 7% cash rewards.
promotions.quota: New customers only for additional HKD2,150 cash bonus

promotions.title: Mox Journey from Scratch Promotion
promotions.highlight: 💥 Complete missions to scratch & win up to HKD8,888
promotions.description: Complete any of five simple challenges to get a Mox Scratch Card with instant prizes. Finish more missions to multiply chances of winning the top prize of HKD8,888 (HKD8,000 SOL(s) + HKD888 cash reward).

promotions.title: Indulge and Grow Bonus Deposit Promotion
promotions.highlight: 🎁 Deposit bonus and chance to win 1-month free lunch
promotions.description: Deposit your bonus into Mox to earn great interest and get a chance to win a 1-month 'free lunch'. For every HKD10,000 deposited, receive one entry into the lucky draw with more deposits increasing winning chances.

promotions.title: Mox x csl Best-in-Town Exclusive Plan Offer
promotions.highlight: 📱 Up to HKD1,380 rebates + free NowTV Pass
promotions.description: Sign up for a new csl plan or renew your existing one with Mox Credit Card autopay to receive an HKD180 monthly fee rebate plus a free Now TV beIN SPORTS Super Pack 1-Month Pass valued at HKD188.
promotions.cost: csl plan subscription with Mox Credit Card autopay

promotions.title: Travel Pick & Go Eggstra Care+ Insurance Promotion
promotions.highlight: ✈️ FREE add-on coverage with Travel Pick & Go insurance
promotions.description: Apply for Travel Pick & Go insurance and receive 1 FREE add-on coverage to help protect your trip from financial stress caused by unexpected events.
promotions.cost: Travel Pick & Go insurance purchase required

promotions.title: MOXTRAVEL New Customer Welcome Offer
promotions.highlight: ✈️ Earn up to 28,500 miles through spending and saving
promotions.description: New customers who use invitation code 'MOXTRAVEL' to open a Mox account and apply for a Mox Credit Card can earn up to 28,500 miles through spending and saving - enough for a round-trip flight to Asia.

promotions.title: Samsung S26 Series Exclusive Offer at The Club
promotions.highlight: 🆓 Invest in money market funds with zero subscription fees
promotions.description: Ping An Digital Bank offers money market funds with no subscription fees. Customers can invest in HKD and USD money market funds with low entry thresholds starting from as little as USD20.
promotions.quota: Available to all investment account holders

promotions.title: Uber Taxi Ride Spending Reward
promotions.highlight: 🚕 Up to HKD90 off Uber Taxi rides
promotions.description: Pay with your Mox Card and enjoy HKD10 off each Uber Taxi ride per month. Applicable when visiting family, heading out for the weekend, or catching a flight.
promotions.quota: Limited to specific number of rides
promotions.cost: Uber Taxi ride payment with Mox Card

promotions.title: MOXDEPO Time Deposit Invitation Code Promotion
promotions.highlight: 💰 Earn HKD2,500 cash rewards with time deposit
promotions.description: Open a Mox Account using invitation code 'MOXDEPO' within 15 days and place a Time Deposit of at least HKD250,000 within 7 days. Maintain the deposit until the end of the Hold Fund Period to earn HKD2,500 cash rewards.
promotions.quota: Only for customers who haven't held any Mox Account in the 12 months prior

promotions.title: MOXSMART Double Rewards Welcome Offer
promotions.highlight: 💸 20% cash rebate from spending across 5 merchants
promotions.description: Earn 20% cash rebate from spending across 5 hot merchants and additional rewards from savings. The promotion combines spending and saving rewards for maximum benefits.

promotions.title: MOXBILL26 HKT Bill Payment Offer
promotions.highlight: 💸 HKD1,200 cash rewards + up to 2% Unlimited CashBack
promotions.description: Pay your HKT bills and earn HKD1,200 cash rewards plus up to 2% Unlimited CashBack. The promotion rewards customers for setting up bill payments through Mox.

promotions.title: Personal Accident Cushion Premium Rebate
promotions.highlight: ⚡️ Up to 2 months premium rebate
promotions.description: Enjoy up to 2 months of premium rebate when you purchase the Personal Accident Cushion insurance. Double rewards are offered as part of this insurance promotion.

promotions.title: Payroll with Mox Top-up Promotion
promotions.highlight: 💰 1.5% p.a. bonus on savings & 2% CashBack on Mox Credit
promotions.description: Set up payroll with Mox to receive a 1.5% p.a. top-up on your savings interest rate and unlock Unlimited 2% CashBack on Mox Credit Card spending. A permanent benefit for payroll customers.

promotions.title: Mission Bonus Rate
promotions.highlight: 🚀 Stack rates up to 3.5% p.a. on deposits
promotions.description: Complete missions to stack wins and increase your interest rate up to 3.5% p.a. on deposits. The more missions completed, the higher the interest rate earned.

promotions.title: Mox Referral Programme
promotions.highlight: 👥 HKD300 cash reward for both referrer and referee
promotions.description: Share your referral code with friends to invite them to open a Mox account. Both referrer and referee earn HKD300 cash reward each when the referee successfully opens an account and completes the spending requirement of HKD1,000 with Mox Credit Card.
promotions.quota: No limit on number of referrals

promotions.title: CLUBLINK Welcome Offer
promotions.highlight: 🛍️ Enjoy year-round deals on The Club
promotions.description: Access Mox Zone on The Club for exclusive year-round deals and discounts. Mox customers can enjoy special privileges when shopping on The Club platform throughout the year.

promotions.title: Mox Asia Miles Time Deposit
promotions.highlight: ✈️ Earn Asia Miles with time deposits
promotions.description: Fly farther with Mox Asia Miles Time Deposit. Convert your savings into travel rewards by earning Asia Miles when you place time deposits with Mox, helping you save for your next trip.

promotions.title: FlexiBoost Savings
promotions.highlight: 💰 Flexible savings with competitive interest rates
promotions.description: Enjoy unmatched flexibility and competitive interest rates with FlexiBoost savings. This savings account feature offers enhanced returns while maintaining accessibility to funds.

promotions.title: New FX Users Rewards
promotions.highlight: 💱 Up to HKD175 cash rewards for new FX users
promotions.description: New FX users can get up to HKD175 cash rewards when using Mox FX services. The promotion encourages customers to try Mox's foreign exchange services with a cash incentive.

promotions.title: Unlimited CashBack with Mox Credit Card
promotions.highlight: 💳 Best in town! Up to 2% Unlimited CashBack
promotions.description: Enjoy Unlimited CashBack with Mox Credit Card, advertised as 'Best in town'. Cardholders can earn up to 2% CashBack on all eligible spending with no caps or restrictions.

promotions.title: 0% Interest Instant Clear
promotions.highlight: 💳 0% interest on Instant Clear facility
promotions.description: Enjoy 0% interest on the Instant Clear borrowing facility. This promotion offers customers interest-free access to funds for managing short-term financial needs.

promotions.title: 1500MOX New Customer Welcome Offer
promotions.highlight: 💵 Earn up to HKD1,500 cash reward + 2% Unlimited CashBack
promotions.description: New customers who use invitation code '1500MOX' to open a Mox account and apply for a Mox Credit Card can earn up to HKD1,500 in cash rewards by meeting spending requirements at any merchant in Hong Kong, plus access to 2% Unlimited CashBack.

promotions.title: Instant Earnings on Deposits
promotions.highlight: ⏱️ Say goodbye to waiting and hello to instant earnings
promotions.description: Say goodbye to waiting and hello to instant earnings on your deposits with Mox. This feature allows customers to start earning interest immediately when funds are deposited.

promotions.title: Mox Credit Card Miles Conversion
promotions.highlight: ✈️ HKD4=1 mile + 0 Limits + 0% FX Fees
promotions.description: Unlock your next journey with Mox Credit Card. For all spending, earn 1 Asia Mile for every HKD4 spent, with no spending limits and 0% foreign exchange fees on overseas transactions.

promotions.title: Mox 0% Fund Subscription Fee Promotion
promotions.highlight: 💰 Enjoy 0% fund subscription fee on any fund purchase
promotions.description: Mox Invest makes your first step into investing simple with 0% fund subscription fee on any fund purchase. Entry starts as low as HKD100/USD100, making it accessible for beginners.

promotions.title: HKT Shop Cash Rewards
promotions.highlight: 🛍️ HKD1,400 Cash Rewards for shopping at HKT
promotions.description: Shop at HKT to get HKD1,400 Cash Rewards. Customers can earn significant cash rewards when making purchases at HKT stores or online platform.

promotions.title: HKT Autopay Bill Rewards
promotions.highlight: 💸 HKD1,200 Cash Rewards + up to 2% CashBack
promotions.description: Autopay your HKT bills and earn HKD1,200 Cash Rewards plus up to 2% CashBack. Set up automatic bill payment to enjoy substantial cash rewards and ongoing cashback.

promotions.title: Tax Season Instant Loan with Low APR
promotions.highlight: 💸 APR as low as 1.18% plus cash rewards up to HKD10,888
promotions.description: Tax Season Instant Loan with APR reduced to as low as 1.18%. Apply through the Mox app for personalized quotation and instant disbursement. Earn up to HKD10,888 cash reward for successful application of designated Instant Loans.

promotions.title: Trip.com Year-round Exclusive Offer
promotions.highlight: ✈️ Up to 8% off + up to 2% Unlimited CashBack on Trip.com
promotions.description: Enjoy up to 8% discount on Trip.com bookings all year long when using Mox Credit Card. Also earn up to 2% Unlimited CashBack on your purchases, making travel bookings more rewarding.
promotions.cost: Trip.com booking with Mox Credit Card

promotions.title: CLUBLINK New Customer Welcome Offer
promotions.highlight: 🎁 Enjoy rewards worth up to HKD1,400
promotions.description: Open a Mox Account with invitation code 'CLUBLINK' to enjoy fantastic rewards worth up to HKD1,400. Special promotion for new customers linking Mox with The Club membership benefits.
promotions.cost: Opening Mox account with specified code

promotions.title: Instant Interest on Time Deposits
promotions.highlight: 🔄 0% interest on Instant Clear facility
promotions.description: Access funds with 0% interest through Mox's Instant Clear facility. Quickly borrow what you need without paying interest, making it an affordable way to manage short-term cash flow needs.

promotions.title: Mox Credit Card Miles Rewards Scheme
promotions.highlight: ✈️ For all spending HKD4=1 mile + 0 Limits + 0% FX Fees
promotions.description: Earn 1 mile for every HKD4 spent with your Mox Credit Card with no earning limits. Additionally, enjoy 0% foreign exchange fees on international purchases, making this ideal for travelers.
promotions.cost: Spending with Mox Credit Card required

promotions.title: MOXHKT25 HKT Shopping Rewards
promotions.highlight: 💰 Shop at HKT to get HKD1,400 Cash Rewards
promotions.description: Shop at HKT with your Mox Card to earn HKD1,400 in Cash Rewards. This limited-time promotion offers substantial rewards for shopping at HKT stores.

promotions.title: MOXDEPO Time Deposit Welcome Offer
promotions.highlight: 💰 Earn HKD2,500 cash rewards with Time Deposit
promotions.description: Open a Mox Account using invitation code 'MOXDEPO', complete account opening within 15 days, place a Time Deposit of at least HKD250,000 within 7 days, and maintain the balance until the end of the Hold Fund Period to earn HKD2,500 cash rewards.
promotions.quota: New customers who haven't held any Mox Account in 12 months
promotions.cost: Minimum Time Deposit of HKD250,000 required

promotions.title: Year-round offers with Mox Credit Card
promotions.highlight: 🎁 Exclusive offers with Unlimited CashBack or Miles
promotions.description: Enjoy fabulous year-round offers when using your Mox Credit Card at partner merchants. Earn Unlimited CashBack or Unlimited Miles on all your spending throughout the year.
promotions.quota: Available to all Mox Credit Card holders

promotions.title: Daily Interest Calculation
promotions.highlight: 💸 Interest on savings calculated and credited to your account daily
promotions.description: Mox calculates and credits interest to your Mox Account daily, allowing your savings to grow faster. This is a permanent feature of Mox accounts with no end date or special eligibility requirements.

promotions.title: Mox Invest Trading Services
promotions.highlight: 📈 Trade HK and US stocks including fractional shares with low fees
promotions.description: Mox is the first digital bank allowing customers to trade in both HK and US stocks, including fractional shares. Invest with low fees in stocks and funds with the security and advantages of a bank.

promotions.title: USD Savings Rate
promotions.highlight: 💵 1% p.a. interest on USD savings with no strings attached
promotions.description: Starting 1 March 2025, enjoy 1% p.a. interest on your USD savings with no strings attached. Interest is calculated and credited to your account daily, allowing you to watch your savings grow every day.

promotions.title: Mox Credit FPS Payments
promotions.highlight: ⚡ Pay with Mox Credit via FPS for transfers and bill payments
promotions.description: Use your Mox Credit to make payments via FPS, making daily transfers or paying bills effortlessly. This feature is automatically unlocked when your credit limit is approved, with no extra documents required.

promotions.title: 3-Minute Investment Account Opening for Existing Customers
promotions.highlight: ⏱️ Open an account in as fast as 3 minutes
promotions.description: Customers can open an account with Ping An Digital Bank in as little as 3 minutes. This applies to standard cases where no additional information or documents are required.

promotions.title: No Minimum Balance Requirement
promotions.highlight: 💰 No minimum balance required for your account
promotions.description: Ping An Digital Bank offers accounts with no minimum balance requirement. Customers can maintain their accounts without worrying about minimum balance fees or penalties.

promotions.title: 24/7 Full Banking Capability
promotions.highlight: 🕒 Access full banking services 24 hours a day, 7 days a week
promotions.description: Ping An Digital Bank provides 24/7 access to full banking capabilities through their mobile app. Customers can manage deposits, transfers, cross-border payments, and FX at any time.

promotions.title: Services for Residents and Visitors in Hong Kong
promotions.highlight: 🌏 Banking services available for both residents and visitors
promotions.description: Ping An Digital Bank provides banking services to both Hong Kong residents and visitors to Hong Kong. Banking services for visitors are only available when physically present in Hong Kong.
promotions.quota: Available to eligible Hong Kong residents and visitors

promotions.title: Low Investment Threshold for Money Market Funds
promotions.highlight: 🪙 Invest in money market funds from just USD20 or HKD100
promotions.description: Ping An Digital Bank offers money market funds with low entry thresholds, starting from as little as USD20 for USD funds and HKD100 for HKD funds. This makes investment accessible to customers with smaller amounts to invest.
promotions.quota: Available to all investment account holders

promotions.title: Hong Kong Stocks Trading with 0 Platform Fee
promotions.highlight: 💹 Trade Hong Kong stocks with zero platform fees
promotions.description: Ping An Digital Bank offers Hong Kong stock trading with no platform fees. Customers only pay a 0.15% commission with a minimum fee of HKD50 per transaction.
promotions.quota: Available to all investment account holders

promotions.title: US Stocks Extended Trading Hours
promotions.highlight: 📈 Trade US stocks during 16-hour trading window with advanced analytics
promotions.description: Customers can trade US stocks during extended hours, covering a 16-hour trading window. The service includes advanced analytics tools to help customers make informed trading decisions.
promotions.quota: Available to all investment account holders

promotions.title: Hong Kong Stock Real-time Level 1 Market Data
promotions.highlight: 📊 Access free real-time Level 1 market data for Hong Kong stocks
promotions.description: Customers with active stock investment services can access real-time Level 1 market data for Hong Kong stocks at no additional charge. This includes real-time stock quotes to help make timely investment decisions.
promotions.quota: Available to customers with active stock investment services

promotions.title: Money Market Funds Same-Day Redemption
promotions.highlight: ⚡ Redeem money market funds with same-day credit to your account
promotions.description: Ping An Digital Bank offers money market funds with the possibility of same-day redemption to your bank account. This provides customers with quick access to their funds when needed.
promotions.quota: Available to all investment account holders

promotions.title: Mixed and Equity Funds 1% Subscription Fee
promotions.highlight: 🏦 Low subscription fees for various fund types
promotions.description: Customers can enjoy discounted subscription fees for various fund types: 0.5% for bond funds and 1% for mixed and equity funds. This makes fund investments more accessible with lower entry costs.
promotions.cost: 0.5% for bond funds, 1% for mixed and equity funds

promotions.title: US Stock Trading Fixed Commission
promotions.highlight: 🇺🇸 Trade US stocks for just USD 0.012 per share
promotions.description: PAObank offers US stock trading with a competitive commission of USD 0.012 per share with a minimum charge of USD 7.88 per trade. There are no additional platform fees, providing transparent pricing for US stock investors.
promotions.quota: Available to all investment account holders
promotions.cost: USD 0.012 per share (minimum USD 7.88 per trade)

promotions.title: System Upgrade Notice
promotions.highlight: ⚠️ Scheduled maintenance affecting mobile banking and customer services
promotions.description: The bank will perform system upgrades and maintenance from 01:30am to 06:30am on August 9, 2020. During this period, mobile banking and customer services may be impacted.

promotions.title: WeLab Global Wallet Best FX Rates in Town
promotions.highlight: 💱 Enjoy the best foreign exchange rates in town
promotions.description: WeLab Global Wallet offers the best foreign exchange rates among 28 retail banks in Hong Kong. The rates are available at cost price with no markup when exchanging HKD to foreign currencies.

promotions.title: WeLab Global Wallet Debit Card Zero Foreign Currency Transaction Fee
promotions.highlight: 💳 $0 foreign currency transaction fee for 10 supported currencies
promotions.description: WeLab Global Wallet Debit Card offers zero foreign currency transaction fees for payments made in 10 supported currencies including JPY, USD, CNY, AUD, GBP, EUR, SGD, CAD, CHF, and NZD.

promotions.title: Easter Lucky Draw & Cash Rebate Promotion
promotions.highlight: 🎁 Win travel cash vouchers and enjoy up to 3% overseas spending cashback
promotions.description: Use WeLab Global Wallet for foreign currency exchange and overseas spending to earn lucky draw chances. 300 prizes including HKD 1,000 travel cash vouchers are available, while enjoying up to 3% cashback on overseas spending.
promotions.cost: Requires eligible transactions with WeLab Global Wallet Debit Card

promotions.title: WeLab Bank Overseas Spending Cashback Campaign
promotions.highlight: 💰 Up to 3% cashback on overseas spending and up to 0.2% on local spending
promotions.description: Enjoy up to 3% cashback on overseas spending and up to 0.2% on local spending when using WeLab Global Wallet Debit Card. Maximum cashback per eligible transaction is HKD 50 or equivalent.
promotions.cost: Requires eligible spending with WeLab Global Wallet Debit Card

promotions.title: Unlimited $0 Subscription and Switching Fees for Funds
promotions.highlight: 💰 Unlimited $0 subscription and switching fees for all funds
promotions.description: WeLab Bank offers unlimited $0 subscription and switching fees for all funds in the Featured Funds service. Instead, a flat monthly fee of 0.1% based on fund holdings is charged, helping customers save up to 85% in transaction fees.
promotions.cost: Monthly platform fee of 0.1% of holdings

promotions.title: Trip.com Discount with WeLab Global Wallet Debit Card
promotions.highlight: ✈️ Save up to HKD 500 on Trip.com bookings
promotions.description: Book flights and hotels on Trip.com with WeLab Global Wallet Debit Card and enjoy discounts of up to HKD 500. Limited quota available on first-come-first-served basis.

promotions.title: WeLab Bank Personal Loan R Friends Referral Program
promotions.highlight: 💰 Earn HKD 800 for each successful loan referral
promotions.description: Refer friends or family to successfully apply for a WeLab Bank personal loan using your referral code (starting with 'FP' or 'TR') and receive HKD 800 cash reward per successful referral. Maximum total reward is HKD 8,000 (10 successful referrals).

promotions.title: Tesla Customer Personal Installment Loan Offer
promotions.highlight: 🚘 Exclusive 4.55% APR personal loan for Tesla customers
promotions.description: Tesla customers can enjoy a preferential personal installment loan with interest rates as low as 4.55% APR. Open a WeLab Bank account or apply for a loan with promo code 'TESLA5' and provide Tesla purchase proof to qualify.
promotions.quota: Tesla customers only, limited quota available

promotions.title: 50 Extra Lucky Draw Chances for New Customers
promotions.highlight: 🎰 New customers get 50 additional lucky draw chances
promotions.description: New customers receive 50 additional lucky draw chances to participate in the promotion with 300 prizes. Use Global Wallet Debit Card for overseas spending to earn 3% cashback and automatically enter the lucky draw.
promotions.cost: Requires eligible spending with WeLab Global Wallet Debit Card

promotions.title: Personal Loan Cash Rebate up to HKD 23,888
promotions.highlight: 💰 Get up to HKD 23,888 cash rebate on personal loans
promotions.description: Customers who successfully apply for a personal loan with an approved amount of HKD 150,001 or above and a repayment period of 24 months or more, and draw down the loan within 7 days of approval, can enjoy a cash rebate of up to HKD 23,888.
promotions.cost: Minimum loan amount of HKD 150,001 with 24+ months repayment period

promotions.title: Investment Fund Cash Rewards for New Customers
promotions.highlight: 💹 Get up to HKD 4,000 cash rewards on fund investments
promotions.description: New customers who register with code 'WL5000' can earn up to HKD 4,000 cash rewards based on cumulative eligible fund transactions. Part of the 2-in-1 welcome rewards promotion.

promotions.title: GoSave 2.0 4% p.a. Time Deposit for New Customers
promotions.highlight: 💵 Enjoy 4% p.a. on HKD time deposits for new customers
promotions.description: New customers who register with code 'WL5000' can enjoy a preferential 4% annual interest rate on HKD GoSave 2.0 time deposits within the specified period. Part of the 2-in-1 welcome rewards promotion.

promotions.title: 2-in-1 Welcome Rewards
promotions.highlight: 💰 Get up to HKD 5,000 cash rewards for new customers
promotions.description: New customers who register with referral code 'WL5000' can enjoy dual welcome offers: up to 4% p.a. GoSave 2.0 time deposit rate plus up to HKD 4,000 investment fund cash rewards, totaling approximately HKD 5,000 in rewards.
promotions.cost: Requires fund investment and time deposit placement

promotions.title: New FX Customer Rebate
promotions.highlight: 💱 Get HKD 50 cashback on your first foreign currency exchange
promotions.description: First-time foreign currency exchange customers can enjoy HKD 50 cashback when converting HKD 20,000 or above into any of the 10 designated popular currencies in a single transaction.
promotions.quota: First-time FX customers only, one-time offer per eligible customer

promotions.title: Tesla Customer Loan Referral Program
promotions.highlight: 🚘 Earn HKD 800 for referring Tesla customers for unsecured loans
promotions.description: Refer friends for Tesla unsecured loans and earn HKD 800 cash reward for each successful referral. The referred friend must successfully apply and draw down the loan within 7 days of approval.

promotions.title: WeLab Bank New Customer 2-in-1 Welcome Offer
promotions.highlight: 💰 Enjoy up to HKD 5,000 cash rewards with time deposit and investment
promotions.description: New customers who open an account with promo code 'WL5000' can enjoy dual welcome benefits: up to 4% p.a. time deposit interest rate and up to HKD 4,000 investment fund cash reward, totaling approximately HKD 5,000 in rewards.
promotions.cost: Requires time deposit placement and fund investment

promotions.title: First-time Foreign Currency Exchange Cash Rebate
promotions.highlight: 💱 Receive HKD 50 cash rebate for your first currency exchange
promotions.description: First-time foreign currency exchange customers who successfully exchange HKD 20,000 or more into one of 10 designated popular foreign currencies in a single transaction can enjoy a HKD 50 cash rebate.
promotions.quota: Limited quota, first come first served; one-time per eligible customer

promotions.title: WeLab Bank Referral Rewards for Personal Loan
promotions.highlight: 💰 Earn HKD 800 for each successful Tesla loan referral
promotions.description: Customers can refer friends who are Tesla owners to apply for WeLab Bank personal instalment loan with promo code 'TESLA5' to enjoy the special 4.55% APR offer. For each successful referral, the referrer will receive HKD 800 cash reward.
promotions.quota: Up to 10 successful referrals per customer (maximum HKD 8,000 reward)

promotions.title: GoSave 2.0 Time Deposit 4% p.a. Interest Rate
promotions.highlight: 💰 Enjoy high 4% p.a. interest rate on HKD time deposits
promotions.description: New customers who open a WeLab Bank account with promo code 'WL5000' can enjoy a preferential interest rate of 4% p.a. on HKD GoSave 2.0 time deposits. The offer is available for one-month deposits placed during the specified period.

promotions.title: Digital Wealth Advisory Service
promotions.highlight: 🤖 AI-powered personalized investment portfolio recommendations
promotions.description: In partnership with Allianz Global Investors, WeLab Bank's Digital Wealth Advisory service provides personalized fund portfolio recommendations based on investment objectives and personal circumstances with automated alerts to track investment progress.

promotions.title: WeLab Money Plus Investment Service
promotions.highlight: 📊 Low-risk money market fund with same-day settlement
promotions.description: WeLab Money Plus offers money market funds with same-day settlement when instructions are submitted before 9am HKT. Aims for returns similar to time deposits but without lock-in periods.

promotions.title: 0.1% Monthly Fund Platform Fee
promotions.highlight: 💼 Low 0.1% monthly fee instead of traditional subscription fees
promotions.description: WeLab Bank charges a uniform monthly fee of 0.1% based on the total value of selected funds, helping customers save nearly 85% in transaction fees compared to traditional subscription fee models. This allows for unlimited trading and portfolio adjustments.
promotions.cost: 0.1% monthly platform fee based on fund value

promotions.title: ZA Bank 0% Fund Subscription Fee Offer until 31 Jul 2026
promotions.highlight: 💰 Enjoy 0% subscription fees on ALL funds with no cap
promotions.description: Users who have activated ZA Bank fund trading services can enjoy 0% fund subscription fees on all funds, with no upper limit. The promotion also includes fee waivers for fund redemptions, allowing 100% of your money to go into the market.
promotions.quota: All ZA Bank users with activated fund trading services

promotions.title: ZA Card StockBack New Customer 2.5% Offer
promotions.highlight: 💰 Earn stock rewards worth 1% of your spending with ZA Card
promotions.description: Hong Kong's first StockBack card program allowing customers to earn shares of stock instead of points when making purchases. Users can choose from 6 displayed stocks for each eligible transaction, with stock rewards worth 1% of the transaction amount.
promotions.quota: Each eligible transaction over HKD 10 earns one StockBack opportunity. StockBack opportunities valid for 48 hours.

promotions.title: Year-Round Travel Offers with ZA Card
promotions.highlight: ✈️ Exclusive discounts for travel-related purchases with ZA Card
promotions.description: ZA Bank offers year-round special offers and discounts for ZA Card users when making travel-related purchases. This includes discounts on flights, hotels, and other travel services throughout the year.

promotions.title: Multi-Currency Savings Account
promotions.highlight: 🌐 Hold 11 different currencies in one account
promotions.description: ZA Bank's multi-currency savings account allows customers to hold 11 different currencies, including HKD, CNY, USD, GBP, SGD, EUR, CAD, AUD, JPY, NZD, and CHF. Users can exchange currencies 24/7 at preferred rates with zero fees.

promotions.title: Free Cash Withdrawals at Visa ATMs
promotions.highlight: 💸 Free cash withdrawals at over 3,000 Visa ATMs across Hong Kong
promotions.description: ZA Bank customers can withdraw cash for free at over 3,000 Visa ATMs across Hong Kong using their ZA Card. This service provides convenient access to cash without incurring withdrawal fees.

promotions.title: Free Crypto Trading Platform Fee for New Customers
promotions.highlight: 🪙 $0 platform fee for the first 90 days after account opening
promotions.description: New customers who open a ZA Bank account can enjoy $0 platform fee when trading cryptocurrencies for the first 90 days after account opening. This allows new users to trade 24/7 directly with HKD or USD deposits without platform fees.
promotions.quota: New customers only; first 90 days after account opening

promotions.title: Custom Card Number Selection for ZA Card
promotions.highlight: 🎯 Choose the last 6 digits of your ZA Card number
promotions.description: ZA Bank is the first in Hong Kong to allow customers to choose the last 6 digits that appear on their card face. This personalization feature gives customers a unique and memorable card number of their choice.

promotions.title: ZA Card No Annual Fee
promotions.highlight: 💳 Zero annual fees and hidden charges on ZA Card
promotions.description: ZA Card comes with no annual fees or hidden charges. The Visa debit card truly belongs to the customer with no recurring costs, and supports digital payment methods including Apple Pay and Google Pay.

promotions.title: ZA Bank FPS Free Instant Transfers
promotions.highlight: ⚡ Free and instant cross-bank transfers via FPS
promotions.description: ZA Bank offers free instant transfers to other banks via the Faster Payment System (FPS). Customers can send and receive HKD and CNY funds using just a mobile phone number, with no fees for any transfer amount.

promotions.title: ZA Bank 0% Brokerage & 0% Custody Fees for Stock Trading
promotions.highlight: 📈 0 brokerage and 0 custody fees for Hong Kong stocks
promotions.description: Trade Hong Kong stocks with zero commission and zero custody fees. Platform fee is as low as HKD 18 per transaction, allowing users to save up to HKD 1,000 in monthly trading costs compared to traditional brokers.
promotions.quota: All ZA Bank users with activated stock trading services
promotions.cost: Platform fee as low as HKD 18 per transaction

promotions.title: ZA Card Millionaire PowerDraw
promotions.highlight: 🏆 Win up to 200% rebate through PowerDraw when using ZA Card
promotions.description: ZA Card users can participate in PowerDraw with every eligible transaction, giving them the chance to win rebates of up to 200% of their transaction amount. PowerDraw provides instant rewards on everyday spending.

promotions.title: Insurance Application in as Fast as 3 Minutes
promotions.highlight: ⏱️ Get insured in as fast as 3 minutes via smartphone
promotions.description: ZA Bank partners with ZA Insure to offer a fully digital insurance application process that can be completed in as fast as 3 minutes via smartphone. Customers can choose from various insurance products including life insurance, critical illness, and Voluntary Health Insurance Scheme (VHIS).

promotions.title: HK Stock Cash Rebate up to HKD 1,000
promotions.highlight: 💰 Receive up to HKD 1,000 cash rebate when buying stocks
promotions.description: Selected customers can receive up to HKD 1,000 cash rebate when buying Hong Kong stocks. After successful account opening, eligible customers can obtain stock cash rebate vouchers through ZA Quest to be used on stock purchases.

promotions.title: ZA Bank Zero Fee SWIFT Global Transfers
promotions.highlight: 🌐 Send money between Chinese Mainland and Hong Kong with zero fees
promotions.description: ZA Bank's Payment Connect service allows customers to send money between the Chinese Mainland and Hong Kong in real-time with zero fees. Transfers are processed instantly, making cross-border payments efficient and cost-effective.

promotions.title: ZA Bank Customer Referral Program for Account Opening
promotions.highlight: ⏱️ Open a ZA Bank account in as little as 2 minutes
promotions.description: ZA Bank offers a streamlined account opening process that can be completed in as fast as 2 minutes. The fully digital process allows Hong Kong residents and visitors to open accounts quickly and conveniently via their smartphones.

promotions.title: ZA Bank 20% p.a. HKD Time Deposit Offer for New Fund Deposit
promotions.highlight: 💰 Enjoy 20% p.a. interest rate on 7-day HKD time deposits
promotions.description: Referred friends who meet deposit requirements can receive a +19.9% p.a. 7-day HKD new funds time deposit interest rate booster coupon through ZA Quest, which can be combined with the base interest rate for a total of 20% p.a. Friends can receive a second coupon after meeting asset balance criteria.
promotions.quota: Referred customers who meet deposit requirements; maximum deposit amount varies by coupon (HKD 20,000 or HKD 100,000)
promotions.cost: Minimum deposit of HKD 1,000 or equivalent from external account

promotions.title: New User HKD 500 Cash Reward
promotions.highlight: 💵 Get up to HKD 500 cash reward when opening a new account
promotions.description: Selected customers can receive up to HKD 500 in cash rewards when opening a new ZA Bank account. Customers can complete specific tasks in ZA Quest after successful account opening to receive the reward.
promotions.quota: Selected new customers only; not applicable to customers who opened accounts through referral programs or have received other new customer gifts

promotions.title: 24/7 Customer Service
promotions.highlight: 🕒 Round-the-clock customer service support
promotions.description: ZA Bank provides 24/7 customer service support to assist customers at any time. This always-available support ensures that customers can receive assistance with their banking needs regardless of the time of day.

promotions.title: ZA Bank Welcome Offer with Code ZAUT66
promotions.highlight: 🎁 Receive HKD 2,026 in rewards and 20% p.a. HKD time deposit
promotions.description: New customers using the invitation code ZAUT66 can enjoy rewards worth HKD 2,026 and 20% p.a. interest rate on HKD time deposits. The offer includes various vouchers and interest rate boost coupons.

promotions.title: ZA Bank 24/7 Banking Service
promotions.highlight: 🕒 24x7 customer service available anytime
promotions.description: ZA Bank provides round-the-clock customer service support to all users. Banking services are always available regardless of time of day, allowing customers to access support whenever needed.

promotions.title: Loan Approval in as fast as 90 seconds
promotions.highlight: ⚡ Loan approval results in as fast as 90 seconds
promotions.description: ZA Bank offers fast loan approval with results available in as little as 90 seconds. Loan amounts up to HKD 1,000,000 are available with annualized percentage rates as low as 1.30%.

promotions.title: ZA Bank Account Opening in as fast as 2 minutes
promotions.highlight: ⏱️ Open an account in as fast as 2 minutes
promotions.description: ZA Bank offers a streamlined account opening process that allows customers to open an account in as little as 2 minutes. The service is available to both Hong Kong residents and visitors in Hong Kong with zero deposit requirements.

promotions.title: Fund Redemption Fee Waiver
promotions.highlight: 🆓 Redemption fee waivers for all funds
promotions.description: ZA Bank customers who have activated fund trading services can enjoy redemption fee waivers for all funds until July 31, 2026. This allows investors to redeem their fund investments without paying any redemption fees.
promotions.quota: All retail banking users who have activated fund trading services

promotions.title: Customer Referral Program - Referrer Rewards
promotions.highlight: 🏆 Earn up to HKD 90,000 in cash rewards for referrals
promotions.description: Refer friends to open ZA Bank accounts and earn various cash rewards. Top 20 referrers with most successful referrals in each phase can earn up to HKD 10,000. Additional rewards available when referred friends meet deposit or multi-product requirements.
promotions.quota: All existing ZA Bank customers eligible to refer

promotions.title: New Customer Welcome Reward and StockBack Bonus
promotions.highlight: 🎁 Rewards worth HKD 2,026 for new customers via referral
promotions.description: New customers who open an account using a referral code can receive a package of rewards worth HKD 2,026 including fund holding rebate coupons (HKD 780 + HKD 20), stock cash rebate coupons, currency exchange discount, and overseas remittance cashback.
promotions.quota: New customers who open account with referral code

promotions.title: ZA Bank Payment Connect Cross-Border Transfer
promotions.highlight: 🌏 Fee-free real-time transfers between Mainland China and Hong Kong
promotions.description: Send money between Mainland China and Hong Kong in real-time with zero fees using Payment Connect. Instant cross-border transfers without any handling charges.

promotions.title: New Stock Trading Customer Cash Rewards
promotions.highlight: 💵 Up to HKD 1,500 in cash rewards for new stock traders
promotions.description: New users can receive up to HKD 500 in cash rewards for opening an account, plus up to HKD 1,000 in cash rebates for buying stocks. This offer is specifically for Hong Kong stock trading customers.
promotions.cost: Must buy stocks to qualify for portion of rewards

promotions.title: Second 20% p.a. Time Deposit for Multi-Product Usage
promotions.highlight: 🔄 Additional 20% p.a. time deposit for using multiple products
promotions.description: New referred customers who hold deposits, funds, and stocks with a total balance of at least HKD 1,000 within 14 days of opening an account can receive an additional +19.9% p.a. 7-day HKD time deposit interest rate booster coupon, providing a second opportunity to enjoy 20% p.a. interest.
promotions.quota: New referred customers using multiple products

promotions.title: 20% p.a. HKD Time Deposit for Meeting Deposit Requirement
promotions.highlight: 💹 New users can enjoy 20% p.a. interest rate on 7-day HKD time deposits
promotions.description: New customers referred through the referral program can receive a +19.9% p.a. 7-day HKD time deposit interest rate bonus coupon, which combined with the base rate offers a total of 20% p.a. interest rate. Additional coupons can be earned by meeting specified requirements.
promotions.cost: Must be referred through program and meet deposit requirements

promotions.title: Fund Position Rebate Vouchers for New Customers
promotions.highlight: 🧾 Receive HKD 800 in fund position rebate vouchers
promotions.description: New customers can receive fund position rebate vouchers worth HKD 800 (including one HKD 780 voucher and one HKD 20 voucher). These vouchers are valid for 30 days after receipt and can be used to offset fund investment costs.
promotions.quota: New customers who open accounts with referral codes

promotions.title: Currency Exchange Discount Voucher
promotions.highlight: 💱 Receive HKD 126 currency exchange discount voucher
promotions.description: New customers can receive a HKD 126 currency exchange discount voucher valid for 30 days after receipt. This voucher can be used to reduce the cost of currency exchange transactions within ZA Bank.
promotions.quota: New customers who open accounts with referral codes

promotions.title: Group Lai See Feature
promotions.highlight: 🧧 Send Group Lai See with one tap without entering recipients individually
promotions.description: Users can distribute Lai See (red packets) to groups with a single tap, eliminating the need to enter recipients individually. This convenient feature simplifies the traditional practice of sending red packets during holidays and special occasions.

promotions.title: ZA Bank x Wise Express Remittance
promotions.highlight: 🚀 HKD payments with express remittance by Wise arrive faster than standard transfers
promotions.description: ZA Bank partners with Wise to provide express remittance services, allowing HKD payments to arrive faster than standard international transfers. This service enables quicker cross-border payments for users.
